content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the full diff across src/cli/project.rs, src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs, tests/cli.rs, and tests/unit/project_run_record_test.rs. The implementation correctly: (1) enriches BeadProjectContext with structured dependency/planned-elsewhere context via new BeadDependencyPromptContext and PlannedElsewherePromptContext types, (2) adds milestone status and progress to prompt rendering, (3) builds planned-elsewhere context from dependents + adjacent workstream neighbors with deduplication and deterministic sorting, (4) gracefully degrades when `br list` fails by falling back to empty summaries with 'unknown' status, (5) moves milestone constraints into the review policy section, (6) uses compact_planned_elsewhere_summary to extract meaningful first-line summaries while skipping fenced code blocks. All new behavior is covered by unit tests in project.rs and integration tests in cli.rs including edge cases for br-list failure, fenced descriptions, unconfirmed membership, and slot reassignment. The one failing test (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_excludes_tracked_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits) is pre-existing and unrelated. Determinism is maintained through BTreeMap/BTreeSet usage and stable sort-by-id ordering. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
